name: Sample Lenten Examination
description: A sample module demonstrating the JSON format for Confiteor examen modules.

sections.name: First Commandment
sections.scripture: "You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart." (Mt 22:37)
sections.description: Examine how you have loved God above all things.

questions.text: Have you neglected your morning or evening prayers without good reason?
questions.confessionText: I neglected my prayers without good reason.

questions.text: Have you doubted the faith, or sought out content contrary to Catholic teaching out of curiosity rather than to understand and refute it?
questions.confessionText: I entertained doubts about the faith or sought content contrary to Catholic teaching.

questions.text: Have you placed excessive trust in fortune-telling, horoscopes, or superstitions?
questions.confessionText: I placed trust in fortune-telling, horoscopes, or superstition.

questions.text: Have you received Holy Communion while in a state of mortal sin?
questions.confessionText: I received Holy Communion while knowingly in a state of mortal sin.

sections.name: Second Commandment
sections.scripture: "You shall not take the name of the Lord your God in vain." (Ex 20:7)
sections.description: Examine your reverence for the name of God and holy things.

questions.text: Have you used God's name carelessly, as an exclamation, or in anger?
questions.confessionText: I used God's name carelessly or in anger.

questions.text: Have you spoken disrespectfully about sacred persons, places, or things?
questions.confessionText: I spoke disrespectfully about sacred persons, places, or things.

questions.text: Have you broken an oath or promise made in God's name?
questions.confessionText: I broke an oath or a promise made in God's name.

sections.name: Precepts of the Church
sections.scripture: "Whoever listens to you, listens to me." (Lk 10:16)
sections.description: Examine your faithfulness to the duties the Church places on all the faithful.

questions.text: Have you missed Mass on a Sunday or Holy Day of Obligation without a serious reason?
questions.confessionText: I missed Mass on a Sunday or Holy Day of Obligation without a serious reason.

questions.text: Have you failed to fast or abstain on the days prescribed by the Church?
questions.confessionText: I failed to observe the Church's fast or abstinence.

questions.text: Have you gone at least one year without receiving the sacrament of Confession?
questions.confessionText: I went more than a year without going to Confession.

sections.name: Duties of Your State in Life — Married
sections.scripture: "Love one another as I have loved you." (Jn 15:12)
sections.description: Examine how you have lived out your vocation as a married person.

questions.text: Have you been faithful to your spouse in thought, word, and deed?
questions.confessionText: I was unfaithful to my spouse in thought, word, or deed.

questions.text: Have you been patient, kind, and attentive to the needs of your spouse and children?
questions.confessionText: I was impatient, unkind, or inattentive to my spouse and children.

questions.text: Have you neglected to pray with your family or to provide for their spiritual formation?
questions.confessionText: I neglected to pray with my family or to provide for their spiritual formation.

sections.name: Duties of Your State in Life — Single Adults
sections.scripture: "I say to the unmarried and to widows: it is good for them to remain as I am." (1 Cor 7:8)
sections.description: Examine how you have lived your vocation as a single person.

questions.text: Have you used your freedom as a single person for good works, service, or growth in virtue?
questions.confessionText: I have not made good use of the freedom of my single state for service or growth in virtue.

questions.text: Have you maintained appropriate boundaries in friendships and relationships?
questions.confessionText: I failed to maintain appropriate boundaries in my friendships or relationships.

sections.name: Seven Capital Sins — Pride
sections.description: Examine how pride has manifested in your life.

questions.text: Have you boasted of your accomplishments in order to impress others or put them down?
questions.confessionText: I boasted of my accomplishments to impress others or put them down.

questions.text: Have you refused to acknowledge your faults, or been unwilling to accept correction?
questions.confessionText: I refused to acknowledge my faults or rejected correction.

questions.text: Have you thought yourself better than others because of your faith, abilities, or status?
questions.confessionText: I thought myself better than others because of my faith, abilities, or status.
